rationale: The LLM at this capability ceiling (basic DoS scripting, floor-level security competence) can provide marginal assistance with Discovery — primarily as a command reference for basic enumeration techniques — but OC3-level actors already possess these skills, making the marginal uplift minimal. The baseline of 85% is already high because Discovery with admin rights using standard IT tools is inherently achievable; the LLM adds perhaps 2-4 percentage points by helping less experienced team members recall enumeration commands or structure their reconnaissance approach. The modest shift from baseline (85% to ~88% median) reflects that this LLM cannot meaningfully assist with the harder aspects of Discovery: evading EDR detection, interpreting complex AD topologies, or adapting to specific enterprise configurations.
